titleStmt.title: SII 30.194: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 194. (A.R. No. 270 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, (Pudūr) Cheyyār Taluk, North Arcot District. Rudrakōṭīśvara temple-on the north wall of the central shrine Rājēndra-Chōḻa 11: Year 9: 1061 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins as Chaṇḍēsvaran ōlai and with the praśasti, ‘Tirumātar puviyeṉṉum’ etc. It records the public sale of land to the temple of Śri Rudrasōlai mahādēva situated on the southern bank of the river Veḥka by the sabhā of Karaikkōṭṭu-brahmadēyam alias Parākarmasōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmar-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgonḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is also stated that the said land measuring 10,000 kuḻi was utilized for the settlement of the peasants of the Rudrasōlai mahādēva temple in the name of Alaṅkāravalli chēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . caṇdheśvaran
Ōlai śākarañacūḻvaiyakatte
caṇṭicaran karuma mārāyum paṇṭe
Aṟañceytāṉceytāṉ Aṟaṅkaṇṭā
n pātam tiṟampāmai ceppeṭeḻuttu
tirumātar puviyeṉṉum
perumātar Ivartam māteviyarka(ḷ)ḷā
(k)ki nitiyiltikaḻum nāḷiṉuḷ Ikal ve
ṇṭeḻuntu ceṉṟarumuṟai koppattu
Ākavamallaṉ poru c(ā)marpuriyum kālai
Arinikar taṉ tiruttamaiya nākiya ven=tiṟal
rājarājanai mun=ti(la)ṟal pakaṭu mottatu
nerāmaracarai neṭuvicumpeṟṟa An=taravāna
ttarampayar Etir koḷa Intiraloka meyti
ya pinpottaḷa kaṭaṟpaṭaik kuṭaintu tan
kaṭaṟppaṭai keṭa kaṇṭañcal Añcal Eṉṟa
ruḷi taṉ kañcaraRead- kuñcaramel kāṟṟeṉa kaṭāviya teri
kaṇai mutaliyan=ti(ā)porupaṭai vaḻaṅkiyum mo
y mā caḷukki tampi cayaciṅkaṉum porpulai
kkeciyum tārtacapanmaṉum Ivar mutalākiya
Eṇṇili Aracarai viṇṇakatteṟṟi Etirātor kā
cilai turantu ceñcaramāri kuñcara mukattilum kuṉ
ṟuṟu toḷ puyattilum taṉtiruttuṭaiyilum
taṉnuṭaṉ kaḷiṟeṟiya vīrar maṭi
yavum vakaiyātoru taṉipukka porto
ḻil caḷukki poruta veḻattai viṭātu ke
ḻṭṭu vittu koṟṟavel tānavaratu kūṟutta
meṟṟivan kaiypaṭai pokaviṭṭu pakaṭiḻintu
kulakula kulaintu talaimayir virintu viṇṇuṟaRead- muṉṉuṟa
neḷittu piṉnuṟa nokki vantiirevanum paya
ppaṭa tūtanum koṉṉavil paṭai tiṇṭappatu
ma meṟṟina veñcina varaica roṭina vāṟṟa talaiñ
ci veruvil muṉnoṭa meṉkoṇṭāṅ kurume
tarapattiramutal kaḷiṟanekamum pariyinnāttira
yum variya teviyum varākavel koṭi mutalrā
japaric ciṉṉamum Enaiyaṉa palavum munai
ype kavarntu porkaḷa viḷākattu pārttivarār mu
ṉnaruñ ceytaṟiyātatu piṉṉaruñ ceytup piṉṟeṇaṟ
kariyatu kaittalattaṉṟiṉ paṭaikeṭat
taṉṟirumeniyiṟ pacum puṇṇā
ḻi nīrttampu Oru puṉalāl nīkkatta
n por karuṅkaḷatte vijaiyābhiṣe
kam vijayamikacceytu vīrasim
hāśanan=tiriya viṭṭeyoṭavaṉ ka
ṅkāpuri pukun=taruḷi naṉṟeṉṟu tānu
m yāvaru ceyyumaṉneṟikaḷom
ttaṉ tiruk kātala
ṉāṉa potalar
teriyal kaṅkai
koṇṭa coḻaṉaiyu
māṉkavan tirumakaṉāna
Āḷavanta perumāḷaiyu
m Aṇikiḷar tan tiru tam
piyar tammuḷ vantiṟal va
ḷavan mummuṭi coḻaṉaiyum
Āṅkiḷar paṭai vīraco
ḻaṉaiyum veḻ mati
rān=tikaṉaiyum tārmati
poṉtaṉait tanti
rumakan rājen=tira co
ḻaṉaiyumirumuṭi co
ḻan rājādhirājan tiri
tiyakaṉnakuṇaruñ coḻa
pāṇṭiyan varicilai(t)
tanik karikālacoḻa kaṅ
kan toṭu kaḻaluttama
coḻaṉenum cuṭarneṟu
navamaṇi puṉai tirumuṭi
cūṭṭit tenṉavar muta
linar tirutaḷaṅ kānava
ṟkaruḷik kārkaṭalilaṅkai
paṭai kaliṅkamaṉ
vīra calāmeka
ṉaik katakaḷiṟoṭu
m tirmuṭitaṭintu
ṟṟa koppat
tu vaṉteḻu caḷukkiya
ṅkeytiya paripava me
nṟu nāḷ Ikal
lamar ceytu nīṅku
vaṉena cintaiyuḷ karuti
Iṉpamāyi nan
Avatarippa palava

mun=tiṟantu Uvarkaṭal Iḷa
n=tatana Iḷarpaṭaiparap
piya vaḷatuḷaṅka na
kaya kāmāṟṟi Avaṉai taṇ
ṭa nāyakaṉ vālā teva
ṉun=tiṟal mallayā
mutaliṉar palapaṭaiya
raicarum porukaḷatta
viya Irukaiyar mutali
yar manṉavar tammoṭu
vaittār vikkalanoṭu
taṉṉilai
Aḻin=ta caḷukki vaṭ
ṭuṭaitara vaṇṭa
pārttiya vaḻi
nṟoru taṉi veḻa
ttuṭapayil Āṅ
kavaṉai Irumuṭi meṉ mel
koṇṭaruḷi poruvaḻi māppe
rum pukaḻ mika vaḷartta koppa
ra kecarivarmarāna Uṭaiyā
r śrīrājentradevaṟkuyā
ṇṭu Onpatāvatu
jayaṅ koṇṭa coḻa
maṇṭalattu tāmar
koṭṭattu tāmar nāṭ
ṭu karaikkoṭṭu brahmade
yamāṉa parākkirama co
ḻaccaturveti maṅka
lattu mahāsabhai
p peruṅkuṟi peruma
kkaḷom nammūr śrīpo
(ṉ)n=tayuṭaiyār pakaliruk
kaiyiley kūṭṭaṅku
ṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu nam
mūr tiruvekkāvin teṟku
śrīru
tracolai mahā
devar Ātidā
sacaṇṭeśvarar
pakkal tiravyam ko
ṇṭu yiyarkaRead- yivarkaḷmuṉpu
Aḷavilun=tarattilum
ye kāṭukoḷākakiṭanta
kollai nilam Urap
patarkki kīḻpāṟkel
lai śrīpon=ta
kavatikku meṟku te
ṉ pāṟkellai tiruc
ciṟṟampalac ceriyi
l vaṭakkil paṟṟuk
maṇaṟ pākkattu Utai
yadivākarapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷi
ṭṭār Iṟai nilattukku
vaṭakkuṅ kiḻakkum me
l pāṟkellai maṇaṟ
ṟpākkattu centai ca
kkiramavittan Iṟai
nilattukkum Īraṅ ko
ḷḷi kellina kuḻikkuk
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kel
lai Ittevar vāykkā
lukkut teṟkum Inṉān
kellai Uḷḷum naṭu
vupaṭṭa kuḻi muvāyi
ramum tevar pūmikku vaṭakkum vaṭakiḻakku cār nila varappataṟku kiḻpāṟkellai kollai nilattukku meṟkum tenpārkellai It(ta)tevar pūmikku vaṭakkum
melpāṟkellaiy Eṅkaḷ kollai nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eṅkaḷ kollai nilattukku teṟkuminnāṉkellai
yuḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi Ēḻāyiramum Āka kuḻi pattāyiramum Ittevar nilam Uḻukuṭikaḷukku kuṭi Irukkaiyāka Ēṟina Alaṅkāravalli cerikku kiḻpārkel
lai Ittevar nilam tenkiḻakkaṭainta nilattukku meṟkkum tenpārkellai viḷai nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāl kellai kku kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟkellai Ittevar pūmikku pācca vāykkālukku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉ kellai Uḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi Āyirattaiññūṟum cantra yāka viṟṟu
vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Irukālāvatum mukkālāvatum muṟcuṭṭappaṭṭana Icain=ta nāṉkellaiy kaḷa nilam
candrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyili devatānamāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Innilam kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ivvalaṅkāra valliceri Eṟina kuṭikaḷai Ācandrakālam
koyil vācalil ponta kuṭimaikaḷum veṭṭi muṭṭai Āḷ Uṭpaṭṭa Amañcikaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭu Epperpaṭṭatum kāṭṭa peṟātomākavum I ratadevatānam Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu kuṭuttiRead- kuṭuttu sabhaiyuḷḷey Iru
ntu kuṇṭūr mātava kiramavittanum maṇpāttu Akkabhaṭṭa sahasrayaṉum maṇaṟpākkattu Āṭavallān bhaṭṭaṉum paṇippaṇiyāl paṇi keṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivūr madhyasdhan Ekāmparan catiraneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu
la trairājyaghaṭikāmadyastan tiruvikkiraman tiruve
kkātitaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven
Ivvūr śivabraāhmaṇaṉ bhāradvāci muṣihavāgana bhaṭṭaṉ makaṉ Ampalak kūttaneṉ
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivūr śivabraāhmaṇa kāśyavaṉ kūtta bhaṭṭaṉ makaṉ Iṣapa tevaṉeṉ
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivūr(v)vaidy(ā)nātaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kautamaṉ tacakkiramapaṭṭaneṉ
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivūr pocaṉ makaṉ kāḷakaṇṭaneṉ
Digital edition of SII 30.194 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
